notes: V1.0.3 BigUp adds clearer update rules for core, patch, and small build releases.
Core platform jumps such as 1.1.0 or 2.0.0 can start the update automatically when online.
Small patch/build updates can be postponed first, then become required after the safe limit.
Update download now shows file size, progress percent, and safer error handling.
Version Notes now highlights the latest remark in green.
Settings includes a TH/EN language foundation and cleaner grouped layout.
